name: Vegetable Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large, heavy pot.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low; stir gently and cover.
4. Simmer for 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
5. Puree the soup in small batches using a food processor or blender.
6. Return pureed soup to the pot.
7. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste.
8. Reheat soup just to boiling point.
9. Serve hot with crusty bread or homemade muffins.
